    Review duplicates
    Click Scan for duplicates to find receipts that look like the same charge (e.g. a photo upload and a Plaid-imported transaction). Merging drops one and keeps the other — the link from any staged transaction is reparented automatically.

    Accounts

    🏦 Connected Accounts
    Connect a bank or credit card via Plaid to auto-import transactions. Imported transactions land in a review queue and are never saved as receipts without your confirmation.

    Contribution

    See how scoring works, what you earned, and how you can help the system stay sharp.

    How Low-Stock Validation Works
    1. Mark an item Low. This starts a pending contribution, but it does not score yet.
    2. Move that item into the Shopping List. That helps the system connect the restock intent.
    3. When a later receipt confirms the item was bought, the low-stock action is validated and earns better points.
    4. If the low flag is quickly cleared or turns out to be wrong, the pending contribution does not count.
    Recent Score Activity

    Settings

    Configure your Grocery Manager

    👤 Session
    🦊
    Not signed in
    —
    📈 My Activity

    Sign in to see your activity.

    🎨 Appearance
    Apple is the cinematic default. Clay adds warm cream canvas, named swatches, and chunky rounded tiles. Notion is paper-calm — warm white, whisper borders, Notion Blue accents, ledger-tabular numbers.
    🧭 Navigation
    Pull past the top or bottom of any page to jump to the previous or next sidebar page. Off by default — turn on only if you miss the gesture. Use Alt+← / Alt+→ for keyboard navigation regardless of this setting.
    🏪 Manage Stores

    Pin merchants to Frequent / Rarely Used / Hidden, or let recency decide automatically.

    📱 Trusted Devices
    Only admins can view or revoke trusted household devices.
    📷 Snapshot Review
    Only admins can review item photos and link them to products.
    💾 Environment Backup & Restore
    Only admins can create environment backups, verify the current state, or restore a saved bundle.
    Portable Recovery

    Create a complete bundle with database, receipts, manifest, and env snapshot. Restore replaces the current state and restarts the backend cleanly.

    Typography

    SF Pro Display ≥ 20 px, SF Pro Text < 20 px.

    Hero — 56 px
    4xl — Section heading
    3xl — Page hero
    2xl — Card title
    Body — 17 px default body copy. Negative tracking runs at every size.
    sm — Links, captions, meta lines.
    xs — Footnotes, timestamps.

    Clay 🍡

    Named-swatch palette, hard-offset shadows, chunky ink borders. Switch theme in Settings → Appearance to see Clay live.

    Named swatches
    Shadow scale
    Buttons
    Hover any button to see the rotate(-8deg) tilt + shadow reveal.
    Chips
    Type scale
    Hero — 56 px
    4xl — Section heading
    3xl — Page hero
    2xl — Card title
    xl — Modal heading
    lg — List item title
    md — Large body
    body — 17 px default body copy.
    body-em — emphasized body
    sm — caption
    xs — chip label
    nano — mini uppercase label

    Processing receipt…

    Confirm action
    Are you sure?
    Update value
    Enter a new value.
    Item Photo
    Manual Entry
    Add a purchase manually when the receipt image is missing. It will count in budget and receipts history. For grocery and restaurant entries, add at least one line item.
    Refund mode: enter positive amounts. The app records this as negative spend.
    Household Bill DetailsFill in what the statement shows

    Pair This Device
    Set up a trusted household screen like a fridge tablet. Scan the QR code from an admin account to approve it.
    Best for a fridge or shared household tablet with normal day-to-day access.
    Waiting for admin approval…
    Approve Device Pairing
    Review this device before granting persistent household access.
    Best for a fridge or shared household tablet with normal day-to-day access.
    Pick which sidebar pages this device can see. Settings stays available for admins. Leave checked to mirror the scope's default set.
    Restore Backup
    Choose what to restore. A safety backup of the current system will be created automatically first.
    Restore Scope
    The system will first create a fresh safety backup of the current environment, then restore the selected sections and restart the backend.
    Restarting Extended
    Your restore finished. Extended is restarting and reconnecting now.
    Waiting for backend health…
    Stay on this page. The app will reconnect automatically once the backend is healthy.
